problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
hypothesis: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Sleep-dependent. Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
